```json
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      version:\n        description: \"Tag version to release\"\n        required: true\n  push:\n    paths-ignore:\n      - \"docs/**\"\n      - \"README.md\"\n      - \".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**\"\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\n    tags:\n      - \"v*\"\n  pull_request:\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\nconcurrency:\n  group: \"${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}\"\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n  \nenv:\n  REGISTRY: docker.io\njobs:\n  build:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    strategy:\n      matrix:\n        jobs:\n          # Windows 11 等现代 PC：64 位、Go 1.25、AMD64 v3\n          - { goos: windows, goarch: amd64, goamd64: v3, output: amd64 }\n\n          # 现代安卓（小米等）：arm64-v8\n          - { goos: android, goarch: arm64, ndk: aarch64-linux-android34, output: arm64-v8 }\n\n    steps:\n    - uses: actions/checkout@v5\n\n    - name: Set up Go\n      uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n      with:\n        go-version: '1.25'\n        check-latest: true\n\n    - name: Set variables\n      run: |\n        VERSION=\"${GITHUB_REF_NAME,,}-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)\"\n        VERSION=\"${VERSION//\\//-}\"\n        PackageVersion=\"$(curl -s \"https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest\" | jq -r '.tag_name' | sed 's/v//g' | awk -F '.' '{$NF = $NF + 1; print}' OFS='.').${VERSION/-/.}\"\n        if [ -n \"${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" ]; then\n          VERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        fi\n        echo \"VERSION=${VERSION}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"PackageVersion=${PackageVersion}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      \n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"CGO_ENABLED=0\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"BUILDTAG=-extldflags --static\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"GOTOOLCHAIN=local\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n    - name: Setup NDK",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "on:"
          },

            "text": "  workflow_dispatch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,

            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        required: true"

            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "  push:"
          },

            "lineNumber": 9,

          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "      - \"docs/**\""
          },

            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "      - \"README.md\""

          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    branches:"

            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "      - Alpha"

            "lineNumber": 15,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "@file:Suppress(\"UNUSED_VARIABLE\")\n\nimport com.android.build.gradle.AppExtension\nimport com.android.build.gradle.BaseExtension\nimport java.net.URL\nimport java.util.*\n\nbuildscript {\n    repositories {\n        mavenCentral()\n        google()\n        maven(\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MetaCubeX/maven-backup/main/releases\")\n    }\n    dependencies {\n        classpath(libs.build.android)\n        classpath(libs.build.kotlin.common)\n        classpath(libs.build.kotlin.serialization)\n        classpath(libs.build.ksp)\n        classpath(libs.build.golang)\n    }\n}\n\nsubprojects {\n    repositories {\n        mavenCentral()\n        google()\n        maven(\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MetaCubeX/maven-backup/main/releases\")\n    }\n\n    val isApp = name == \"app\"\n\n    apply(plugin = if (isApp) \"com.android.application\" else \"com.android.library\")\n\n    fun queryConfigProperty(key: String): Any? {\n        val localProperties = Properties()\n        val localPropertiesFile = rootProject.file(\"local.properties\")\n        if (localPropertiesFile.exists()) {\n            localProperties.load(localPropertiesFile.inputStream())\n        } else {\n            return null\n        }\n        return localProperties.getProperty(key)\n    }\n\n    extensions.configure\u003cBaseExtension\u003e {\n        buildFeatures.buildConfig = true\n        defaultConfig {\n            ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "NAME=mihomo\nBINDIR=bin\nBRANCH=$(shell git branch --show-current)\nifeq ($(BRANCH),Alpha)\nVERSION=alpha-$(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD)\nelse ifeq ($(BRANCH),Beta)\nVERSION=beta-$(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD)\nelse ifeq ($(BRANCH),)\nVERSION=$(shell git describe --tags)\nelse\nVERSION=$(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD)\nendif\n\nBUILDTIME=$(shell date -u)\nGOBUILD=CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags with_gvisor -trimpath -ldflags '-X \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.Version=$(VERSION)\" \\\n\t\t-X \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.BuildTime=$(BUILDTIME)\" \\\n\t\t-w -s -buildid='\n\nPLATFORM_LIST = \\\n\tdarwin-386 \\\n\tdarwin-amd64-compatible \\\n\tdarwin-amd64 \\\n\tdarwin-amd64-v1 \\\n\tdarwin-amd64-v2 \\\n\tdarwin-amd64-v3 \\\n\tdarwin-arm64 \\\n\tlinux-386 \\\n\tlinux-amd64-compatible \\\n\tlinux-amd64 \\\n\tlinux-amd64-v1 \\\n\tlinux-amd64-v2 \\\n\tlinux-amd64-v3 \\\n\tlinux-armv5 \\\n\tlinux-armv6 \\\n\tlinux-armv7 \\\n\tlinux-arm64 \\\n\tlinux-mips64 \\\n\tlinux-mips64le \\\n\tlinux-mips-softfloat \\\n\tlinux-mips-hardfloat \\\n\tlinux-mipsle-softfloat \\\n\tlinux-mipsle-hardfloat \\\n\tlinux-riscv64 \\\n\tlinux-loong64 \\\n\tandroid-arm64 \\\n\tfreebsd-386 \\\n\tfreebsd-amd64 \\\n\tfreebsd-arm64\n\nWINDOWS_ARCH_LIST = \\\n\twindows-386 \\\n\twindows-amd64-compatible \\\n\twindows-amd64 \\\n\twindows-amd64-v1 \\\n\twindows-amd64-v2 \\\n\twindows-amd64-v3 \\\n\twindows-arm64 \\\n    windows-arm32v7\n\nall:linux-amd64-v3 linux-arm64\\\n\tdarwin-amd64-v3 darwin-arm64\\\n \twindows-amd64-v3 windows-arm64\\\n\n\ndarwin-all: darwin-amd64-v3 darwin-arm64\n\ndocker:\n\tGOAMD64=v1 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-386:\n\tGOARCH=386 GOOS=darwin $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-amd64-compatible:\n\tGOARCH=amd64 GOOS=darwin GOAMD64=v1 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-amd64:\n\tGOARCH=amd64 GOOS=darwin GOAMD64=v3 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-amd64-v1:\n\tGOARCH=amd64 GOOS=darwin GOAMD64=v1 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-amd64-v2:\n\tGOARCH=amd64 GOOS=darwin GOAMD64=v2 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Pre-Release\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n\njobs:\n  BuildPreRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Cache debug keystore\n        uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: ~/.android/debug.keystore\n          key: debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}\n\n      - name: Generate debug keystore if not exists\n        if: cache-hit != 'true'\n        run: |\n          mkdir -p ~/.android\n          keytool -genkey -v -keystore ~/.android/debug.keystore -storepass android -alias androiddebugkey -keypass android -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -dname \"CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US\"\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      # - name: Signing properties\n      #   env:\n      #     SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n      #   run: |\n      #     touch signing.properties",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "            }\n        }\n\n        signingConfigs {\n            val keystore = rootProject.file(\"signing.properties\")\n            if (keystore.exists()) {\n                create(\"release\") {\n                    val prop = Properties().apply {\n                        keystore.inputStream().use(this::load)\n                    }\n\n                    storeFile = rootProject.file(\"release.keystore\")\n                    storePassword = prop.getProperty(\"keystore.password\")!!\n                    keyAlias = prop.getProperty(\"key.alias\")!!\n                    keyPassword = prop.getProperty(\"key.password\")!!\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        buildTypes {\n            named(\"release\") {\n                isMinifyEnabled = isApp\n                isShrinkResources = isApp\n                signingConfig = signingConfigs.findByName(\"release\") ?: signingConfigs[\"debug\"]\n                proguardFiles(\n                    getDefaultProguardFile(\"proguard-android-optimize.txt\"),\n                    \"proguard-rules.pro\"\n                )\n            }\n            named(\"debug\") {\n                versionNameSuffix = \".debug\"\n            }\n        }\n\n        buildFeatures.apply {\n            dataBinding {\n                isEnabled = name != \"hideapi\"\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (isApp) {\n            this as AppExtension\n\n            splits {\n                abi {\n                    isEnable = true\n                    isUniversalApk = true\n                    reset()\n                    include(\"arm64-v8a\", \"armeabi-v7a\", \"x86\", \"x86_64\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        compileOptions {\n            sourceCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_21\n            targetCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_21\n        }\n    }\n}\n\ntask(\"clean\", type = Delete::class) {\n    delete(rootProject.buildDir)\n}\n\ntasks.wrapper {\n    distributionType = Wrapper.DistributionType.ALL",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0)\n\n# 获取git hash\n\nmessage(STATUS \"CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR= ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}\")\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   \n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE COMMIT_HASH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" COMMIT_HASH \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nlist(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMMIT_HASH ${COMMIT_HASH})\nstring(SUBSTRING ${COMMIT_HASH} 0 7 COMMIT_HASH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git hash= ${COMMIT_HASH}\")\n\n# 获取分支名称\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git branch -r --contains ${COMMIT_HASH}\n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE CURRENT_BRANCH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" CURRENT_BRANCH \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\nlist(GET CURRENT_BRANCH 1 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"origin/\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\n#string(SUBSTRING ${CURRENT_BRANCH} 0 8 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git current branch = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\n\n# 获取生成时间\nstring(TIMESTAMP COMPILE_TIME \"%y%m%d\")\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"\\\"\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\n\n# 生成版本信息\nset(GIT_VERSION \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\")\nmessage(STATUS \"version info = ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 去除空格\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"[ ]+\" \"\" GIT_VERSION \"${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 保存变量到文件\nconfigure_file(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h @ONLY)\n\nproject(clash-bridge C)\n\n\nset(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE on)\nset(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE \"${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE} -O3\")\n\nset(GO_OUTPUT_BASE ${GO_OUTPUT}/${FLAVOR_NAME})\n\nif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Debug\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Debug\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Release\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"RelWithDebInfo\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (u *CoreUpdater) download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL string) (err error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second*90)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\tresp, err := mihomoHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, packageURL, http.MethodGet, nil, nil, mihomoHttp.WithCAOption(ca.Option{ZeroTrust: true}))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"http request failed: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tcloseErr := resp.Body.Close()\n\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = closeErr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updateDir %s\", updateDir)\n\terr = os.Mkdir(updateDir, 0o755)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"mkdir error: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: saving package to file %s\", packagePath)\n\t// Create the output file\n\twc, err := os.OpenFile(packagePath, os.O_WRONLY|os.O_CREATE|os.O_TRUNC, 0o755)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"os.OpenFile(%s): %w\", packagePath, err)\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tcloseErr := wc.Close()\n\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = closeErr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: reading http body\")\n\t// This use of io.Copy is now safe, because we limited body's Reader.\n\tn, err := io.Copy(wc, io.LimitReader(resp.Body, MaxPackageFileSize))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"io.Copy(): %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif n == MaxPackageFileSize {\n\t\t// Use whether n is equal to MaxPackageFileSize to determine whether the limit has been reached.\n\t\t// It is also possible that the size of the downloaded file is exactly the same as the maximum limit,\n\t\t// but we should not consider this too rare situation.\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"attempted to read more than %d bytes\", MaxPackageFileSize)\n\t}\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: downloaded package to file %s\", packagePath)\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// unpack extracts the files from the downloaded archive.\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) unpack(updateDir, packagePath string, fileMode os.FileMode) error {\n\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: unpacking package\")",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "func (u *CoreUpdater) download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL string) (err error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second*90)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "\tdefer cancel()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "\tresp, err := mihomoHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, packageURL, http.MethodGet, nil, nil, mihomoHttp.WithCAOption(ca.Option{ZeroTrust: true}))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"http request failed: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "\tdefer func() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "\t\tcloseErr := resp.Body.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "\t\t\terr = closeErr"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "\t}()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "\tlog.Debugln(\"updateDir %s\", updateDir)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "\terr = os.Mkdir(updateDir, 0o755)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"mkdir error: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: saving package to file %s\", packagePath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\t// Create the output file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\twc, err := os.OpenFile(packagePath, os.O_WRONLY|os.O_CREATE|os.O_TRUNC, 0o755)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"os.OpenFile(%s): %w\", packagePath, err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "\tdefer func() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "\t\tcloseErr := wc.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "\t\t\terr = closeErr"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "\t}()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: reading http body\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "\t// This use of io.Copy is now safe, because we limited body's Reader."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "\tn, err := io.Copy(wc, io.LimitReader(resp.Body, MaxPackageFileSize))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"io.Copy(): %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "\tif n == MaxPackageFileSize {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\t\t// Use whether n is equal to MaxPackageFileSize to determine whether the limit has been reached."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "\t\t// It is also possible that the size of the downloaded file is exactly the same as the maximum limit,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "\t\t// but we should not consider this too rare situation."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"attempted to read more than %d bytes\", MaxPackageFileSize)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: downloaded package to file %s\", packagePath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "// unpack extracts the files from the downloaded archive."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "func (u *CoreUpdater) unpack(updateDir, packagePath string, fileMode os.FileMode) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: unpacking package\")"
          }
        ],

        "contents": "package updater\n\nimport (\n\t\"archive/zip\"\n\t\"compress/gzip\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"os/exec\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/ca\"\n\tmihomoHttp \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/http\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/features\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/http\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tbaseReleaseURL    = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest/download/\"\n\tversionReleaseURL = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest/download/version.txt\"\n\n\tbaseAlphaURL    = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/download/Prerelease-Alpha/\"\n\tversionAlphaURL = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/download/Prerelease-Alpha/version.txt\"\n\n\t// MaxPackageFileSize is a maximum package file length in bytes. The largest\n\t// package whose size is limited by this constant currently has the size of\n\t// approximately 32 MiB.\n\tMaxPackageFileSize = 32 * 1024 * 1024\n)\n\nconst (\n\tReleaseChannel = \"release\"\n\tAlphaChannel   = \"alpha\"\n)\n\n// CoreUpdater is the mihomo updater.\n// modify from https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome/blob/595484e0b3fb4c457f9bb727a6b94faa78a66c5f/internal/updater/updater.go\ntype CoreUpdater struct {\n\tmu sync.Mutex\n}\n\nvar DefaultCoreUpdater = CoreUpdater{}\n\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) CoreBaseName()",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "Build mihomo:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;shell\ngit clone https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo.git\ncd mihomo \u0026\u0026 go mod download\ngo build\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSet go proxy if a connection to GitHub is not possible:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;shell\ngo env -w GOPROXY=https://goproxy.io,direct\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nBuild with gvisor tun stack:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;shell\ngo build -tags with_gvisor\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### IPTABLES configuration\n\nWork on Linux OS which supported &#96;iptables&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n# Enable the TPROXY listener\ntproxy-port: 9898\n\niptables:\n  enable: true # default is false\n  inbound-interface: eth0 # detect the inbound interface, default is 'lo'\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Debugging\n\nCheck [wiki](https://wiki.metacubex.one/api/#debug) to get an instruction on using debug\nAPI.\n\n## Credits\n\n- [Dreamacro/clash](https://github.com/Dreamacro/clash)\n- [SagerNet/sing-box](https://github.com/SagerNet/sing-box)\n- [riobard/go-shadowsocks2](https://github.com/riobard/go-shadowsocks2)\n- [v2ray/v2ray-core](https://github.com/v2ray/v2ray-core)\n- [WireGuard/wireguard-go](https://github.com/WireGuard/wireguard-go)\n- [yaling888/clash-plus-pro](https://github.com/yaling888/clash)\n\n## License\n\nThis software is released under the GPL-3.0 license.\n\n**In addition, any downstream projects not affiliated with &#96;MetaCubeX&#96; shall not contain the word &#96;mihomo&#96; in their names.**",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "Build mihomo:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;shell"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "git clone https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo.git"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "cd mihomo \u0026\u0026 go mod download"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "go build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "Set go proxy if a connection to GitHub is not possible:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;shell"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "go env -w GOPROXY=https://goproxy.io,direct"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "Build with gvisor tun stack:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;shell"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "go build -tags with_gvisor"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "### IPTABLES configuration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "Work on Linux OS which supported &#96;iptables&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "# Enable the TPROXY listener"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "tproxy-port: 9898"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "iptables:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "  enable: true # default is false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  inbound-interface: eth0 # detect the inbound interface, default is 'lo'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "## Debugging"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "Check [wiki](https://wiki.metacubex.one/api/#debug) to get an instruction on using debug"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "API."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "## Credits"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "- [Dreamacro/clash](https://github.com/Dreamacro/clash)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "- [SagerNet/sing-box](https://github.com/SagerNet/sing-box)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "- [riobard/go-shadowsocks2](https://github.com/riobard/go-shadowsocks2)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "- [v2ray/v2ray-core](https://github.com/v2ray/v2ray-core)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "- [WireGuard/wireguard-go](https://github.com/WireGuard/wireguard-go)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "- [yaling888/clash-plus-pro](https://github.com/yaling888/clash)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "## License"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "This software is released under the GPL-3.0 license."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "**In addition, any downstream projects not affiliated with &#96;MetaCubeX&#96; shall not contain the word &#96;mihomo&#96; in their names.**"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 124,
            "line": 100

          "startPosition": {
            "line": 49
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\core\\src\\foss\\golang\\clash\\README.md",
        "signatures": {}

      "score": 0.3458077907562256
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "plugins {\n    kotlin(\"android\")\n    id(\"com.android.library\")\n}\n\ndependencies {\n    compileOnly(project(\":hideapi\"))\n\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.coroutine)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.core)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### Feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Feature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### Requirement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {

            "text": "- Android 5.0+ (minimum)"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### Build"

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,

          },

            "lineNumber": 28

            "text": "3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with"

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {

            "text": "4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;."

            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package main\n\n/*\n#cgo LDFLAGS: -llog\n\n#include \"bridge.h\"\n*/\nimport \"C\"\n\nimport (\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"runtime/debug\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/config\"\n\t\"cfa/native/delegate\"\n\t\"cfa/native/tunnel\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n)\n\nfunc main() {\n\tpanic(\"Stub!\")\n}\n\n//export coreInit\nfunc coreInit(home, versionName, gitVersion C.c_string, sdkVersion C.int) {\n\th := C.GoString(home)\n\tv := C.GoString(versionName)\n\tg := C.GoString(gitVersion)\n\ts := int(sdkVersion)\n\n\tdelegate.Init(h, v, g, s)\n\n\treset()\n}\n\n//export reset\nfunc reset() {\n\tconfig.LoadDefault()\n\ttunnel.ResetStatistic()\n\ttunnel.CloseAllConnections()\n\n\truntime.GC()\n\tdebug.FreeOSMemory()\n}\n\n//export forceGc\nfunc forceGc() {\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tlog.Infoln(\"[APP] request force GC\")\n\n\t\truntime.GC()\n\t\tdebug.FreeOSMemory()\n\t}()\n}",
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="list_dir_v2"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **list_dir_v2**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


构建流程说明：

当前逻辑：从源码编译，不使用预编译二进制

构建流程：
1. 子模块源码：`core/src/foss/golang/clash`（来自 `MikeKen-Ken/mihomo` 的 Alpha 分支）
2. Android 包装层：`core/src/main/golang/native`（Android 适配代码）
3. 编译过程（`core/build.gradle.kts`）：
   ```kotlin
   golang {
       sourceSets {
           create("alpha") {
               tags.set(listOf("foss","with_gvisor","cmfa"))
               srcDir.set(file("src/foss/golang"))  // 从 mihomo 源码编译
           }
       }
       all {
           fileName.set("libclash.so")  // 编译成动态库
       }
   }
   ```
4. 构建步骤：
   - 拉取子模块（`git submodule update`）
   - 使用 `golang-android` 插件编译 Go 源码
   - 生成 `libclash.so`（每个 ABI：arm64-v8a, armeabi-v7a, x86, x86_64）
   - 通过 CMake 链接到 Android JNI bridge
   - 打包进 APK

结论：
- 每次构建 Android 包时，都会从你的 mihomo 源码（`MikeKen-Ken/mihomo` Alpha 分支）重新编译
- 不使用 mihomo 仓库中已构建好的 Android 二进制
- 使用的是源码，编译成 `libclash.so` 并打包进 APK

优势：
- 使用你 fork 的最新代码
- 可以自定义编译选项和标签（`with_gvisor`, `cmfa` 等）
- 与 Android 项目集成更紧密

如果需要改用预编译二进制，需要修改构建配置。当前是从源码编译的。

---

_**User**_

现在只需要构建一个安卓版本就可以，适配最新的安卓手机就行了

_**Agent (default)**_


配置已完成。`build-pre-release.yaml` 使用通配符 `app/build/outputs/apk/alpha/release/*`，会自动包含所有生成的 APK。由于现在只构建 arm64-v8a，只会有一个 APK 文件。

**已完成的修改：**

1. **`build.gradle.kts`**：
   - NDK ABI filters：只保留 `arm64-v8a`
   - CMake ABI filters：只保留 `arm64-v8a`
   - APK splits：只包含 `arm64-v8a`

2. **`core/build.gradle.kts`**：
   - ABI 列表：只保留 `arm64-v8a`

3. **`.github/workflows/build-debug.yaml`**：
   - 只上传 arm64-v8a 的 APK（其他架构的上传步骤已移除）

**现在的构建结果：**
- 只构建 **arm64-v8a** 架构（适配最新 Android 手机）
- 构建速度更快（只编译一个架构）
- APK 体积更小（不包含其他架构的库）
- 推送到 `main` 分支会自动构建并发布到 GitHub Release

**注意：** arm64-v8a 支持：
- 所有现代 Android 手机（2015 年后的设备）
- 不支持：32 位 ARM 设备（armeabi-v7a）和 x86/x86_64 设备（主要是模拟器）

配置已完成，可以直接推送代码进行测试。

_**Agent (default)**_

已修复。

**修改内容：**
- 为 `Release Changelog Builder` 步骤添加了 `continue-on-error: true`
- 即使 changelog 生成失败，也不会中断整个构建流程

**工作原理：**
- 第一次构建：没有 tag → changelog 生成失败，但构建继续
- 后续构建：有 `Prerelease-alpha` tag → changelog 正常生成

**现在的流程：**
1. 构建 APK
2. 创建/更新 `Prerelease-alpha` tag
3. 上传到 GitHub Release
4. 尝试生成 changelog（失败不影响构建）

现在可以正常构建了。第一次构建后会有 tag，后续构建的 changelog 会正常生成。

_**Agent (default)**_


当前情况：

- 当前构建工作流使用 `git submodule update --init --recursive --force`（无 `--remote`），会拉取主仓库中记录的 commit，不是最新代码。
- 因此，mihomo 更新后需要手动更新子模块并提交，构建才会使用新代码。

两种方案：

- 方案 1：保持现状（手动更新，更可控）
  - 当 mihomo 更新时，手动执行：
    ```bash
    git submodule update --remote
    git add .gitmodules core/src/foss/golang/clash
    git commit -m "Update mihomo submodule"
    git push
    ```
  - 优点：可控，可以选择何时更新
  - 缺点：需要手动操作

- 方案 2：自动使用最新代码（推荐）
  - 修改构建工作流，添加 `--remote`，每次构建自动拉取最新代码。


_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: C:\Users\Ken-Narmal\Desktop\ClashMetaForAndroid\.github\workflows\build-pre-release.yaml</summary>

</details>

</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


已修改构建工作流，现在会自动使用最新的 mihomo 代码。

**修改内容：**
- 在 `build-pre-release.yaml` 中添加了 `--remote` 参数
- 每次构建会自动拉取 `MikeKen-Ken/mihomo` 的 `Alpha` 分支的最新代码

**现在的行为：**
- 推送到 `main` 分支 → 自动构建
- 构建时自动拉取 mihomo 的最新代码（Alpha 分支）
- 无需手动更新子模块

**注意：**
- 每次构建都会使用最新的 mihomo 代码
- 如果 mihomo 有破坏性更新，可能会影响构建
- 如果需要固定某个版本，可以回到手动更新方式

**其他工作流：**
- `build-debug.yaml` 和 `build-release.yaml` 仍使用固定版本（适合测试和发布）
- 只有 `build-pre-release.yaml` 使用最新代码（适合持续集成）

这样配置后，每次构建都会自动使用你 fork 的最新 mihomo 代码，无需手动更新。

---

```json
        "contents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?\u003e\n\u003clayout xmlns:android=\"http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android\"\u003e\n    \u003cdata\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"versionName\"\n            type=\"String\" /\u003e\n    \u003c/data\u003e\n\n    \u003cLinearLayout\n        android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n        android:layout_height=\"wrap_content\"\n        android:gravity=\"center_vertical\"\n        android:orientation=\"horizontal\"\n        android:padding=\"@dimen/dialog_padding\"\u003e\n\n        \u003cView\n            android:layout_width=\"@dimen/about_icon_size\"\n            android:layout_height=\"@dimen/about_icon_size\"\n            android:background=\"@drawable/ic_clash\" /\u003e\n\n        \u003cLinearLayout\n            android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n            android:layout_height=\"wrap_content\"\n            android:layout_marginStart=\"@dimen/about_text_margin\"\n            android:orientation=\"vertical\"\u003e\n\n            \u003cTextView\n                android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n                android:layout_height=\"wrap_content\"\n                android:text=\"@string/application_name\"\n                android:textAppearance=\"@style/TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Body1\" /\u003e\n\n            \u003cTextView\n                android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n                android:layout_height=\"wrap_content\"\n                android:layout_marginTop=\"@dimen/item_text_margin\"\n                android:text=\"@{versionName}\"\n                android:textAppearance=\"@style/TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Body2\" /\u003e\n        \u003c/LinearLayout\u003e\n    \u003c/LinearLayout\u003e\n\u003c/layout\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setHasProviders(has: Boolean) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.hasProviders = has\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun showAbout(versionName: String) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            val binding = DesignAboutBinding.inflate(context.layoutInflater).apply {\n                this.versionName = versionName\n            }\n\n            AlertDialog.Builder(context)\n                .setView(binding.root)\n                .show()\n        }\n    }\n\n    init {\n        binding.self = this\n\n        binding.colorClashStarted = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorPrimary)\n        binding.colorClashStopped = context.resolveThemedColor(R.attr.colorClashStopped)\n    }\n\n    fun request(request: Request) {\n        requests.trySend(request)\n    }\n}",

            "text": "        binding.self = this"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "        binding.colorClashStarted = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorPrimary)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "        binding.colorClashStopped = context.resolveThemedColor(R.attr.colorClashStopped)"

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 88,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "        requests.trySend(request)"
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "init {\n        binding.surface = surface\n\n        binding.activityBarLayout.applyFrom(context)\n\n        binding.scrollRoot.bindAppBarElevation(binding.activityBarLayout)\n\n        val screen = preferenceScreen(context) {\n            tips(R.string.tips_help)\n\n            category(R.string.document)\n\n            clickable(\n                title = R.string.clash_wiki,\n                summary = R.string.clash_wiki_url\n            ) {\n                clicked {\n                    openLink(Uri.parse(context.getString(R.string.clash_wiki_url)))\n                }\n            }\n\n            clickable(\n                title = R.string.clash_meta_wiki,\n                summary = R.string.clash_meta_wiki_url\n            ) {\n                clicked {\n                    openLink(Uri.parse(context.getString(R.string.clash_meta_wiki_url)))\n                }\n            }\n\n            category(R.string.sources)\n\n            clickable(\n                title = R.string.clash_meta_core,\n                summary = R.string.clash_meta_core_url\n            ) {\n                clicked {\n                    openLink(Uri.parse(context.getString(R.string.clash_meta_core_url)))\n                }\n            }\n\n            clickable(\n                title = R.string.clash_meta_for_android,\n                summary = R.string.meta_github_url\n            ) {\n                clicked {\n                    openLink(Uri.parse(context.getString(R.string.meta_github_url)))\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        binding.content.addView(screen.root)\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.view.View\nimport androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.TunnelState\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.util.trafficTotal\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignAboutBinding\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignMainBinding\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.layoutInflater\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.resolveThemedColor\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.root\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\n\nclass MainDesign(context: Context) : Design\u003cMainDesign.Request\u003e(context) {\n    enum class Request {\n        ToggleStatus,\n        OpenProxy,\n        OpenProfiles,\n        OpenProviders,\n        OpenLogs,\n        OpenSettings,\n        OpenHelp,\n        OpenAbout,\n    }\n\n    private val binding = DesignMainBinding\n        .inflate(context.layoutInflater, context.root, false)\n\n    override val root: View\n        get() = binding.root\n\n    suspend fun setProfileName(name: String?) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.profileName = name\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setClashRunning(running: Boolean) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.clashRunning = running\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setForwarded(value: Long) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.forwarded = value.trafficTotal()\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setMode(mode: TunnelState.Mode) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.mode = when (mode) {\n                TunnelState.Mode.Direct -\u003e context.getString(R.string.direct_mode)\n                TunnelState.Mode.Global -\u003e context.getString(R.string.global_mode)\n                TunnelState.Mode.Rule -\u003e context.getString(R.string.rule_mode)\n                else -\u003e context.getString(R.string.rule_mode)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setHasProviders(has: Boolean) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.hasProviders = has\n        ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash\n\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.util.intent\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.SettingsDesign\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.isActive\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.selects.select\n\nclass SettingsActivity : BaseActivity\u003cSettingsDesign\u003e() {\n    override suspend fun main() {\n        val design = SettingsDesign(this)\n\n        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                events.onReceive {\n\n                }\n                design.requests.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        SettingsDesign.Request.StartApp -\u003e\n                            startActivity(AppSettingsActivity::class.intent)\n                        SettingsDesign.Request.StartNetwork -\u003e\n                            startActivity(NetworkSettingsActivity::class.intent)\n                        SettingsDesign.Request.StartOverride -\u003e\n                            startActivity(OverrideSettingsActivity::class.intent)\n                        SettingsDesign.Request.StartMetaFeature -\u003e\n                            startActivity(MetaFeatureSettingsActivity::class.intent)\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import com.github.kr328.clash.design.R\n\nabstract class BaseActivity\u003cD : Design\u003c*\u003e\u003e : AppCompatActivity(),\n    CoroutineScope by MainScope(),\n    Broadcasts.Observer {\n    \n    protected val uiStore by lazy { UiStore(this) }\n    protected val events = Channel\u003cEvent\u003e(Channel.UNLIMITED)\n    protected var activityStarted: Boolean = false\n    protected val clashRunning: Boolean\n        get() = Remote.broadcasts.clashRunning\n    protected var design: D? = null\n        set(value) {\n            field = value\n            if (value != null) {\n                setContentView(value.root)\n            } else {\n                setContentView(View(this))\n            }\n        }\n\n    private var defer: suspend () -\u003e Unit = {}\n    private var deferRunning = false\n    private val nextRequestKey = AtomicInteger(0)\n    private var dayNight: DayNight = DayNight.Day\n\n    protected abstract suspend fun main()\n\n    fun defer(operation: suspend () -\u003e Unit) {\n        this.defer = operation\n    }\n\n    suspend fun \u003cI, O\u003e startActivityForResult(\n        contracts: ActivityResultContract\u003cI, O\u003e,\n        input: I,\n    ): O = withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n        val requestKey = nextRequestKey.getAndIncrement().toString()\n\n        ActivityResultLifecycle().use { lifecycle, start -\u003e\n            suspendCoroutine { c -\u003e\n                activityResultRegistry.register(requestKey, lifecycle, contracts) {\n                    c.resume(it)\n                }.apply { start() }.launch(input)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setContentDesign(design: D) {\n        suspendCoroutine\u003cUnit\u003e {\n            window.decorView.post {\n                this.design = design\n                it.resume(Unit)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {\n        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)\n        applyDayNight()\n\n        launch {\n            main()\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onStart() {\n        super.onStart()",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class MainActivity : BaseActivity\u003cMainDesign\u003e() {\n    override suspend fun main() {\n        val design = MainDesign(this)\n\n        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        design.fetch()\n\n        val ticker = ticker(TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(1))\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                events.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        Event.ActivityStart,\n                        Event.ServiceRecreated,\n                        Event.ClashStop, Event.ClashStart,\n                        Event.ProfileLoaded, Event.ProfileChanged -\u003e design.fetch()\n                        else -\u003e Unit\n                    }\n                }\n                design.requests.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        MainDesign.Request.ToggleStatus -\u003e {\n                            if (clashRunning)\n                                stopClashService()\n                            else\n                                design.startClash()\n                        }\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenProxy -\u003e\n                            startActivity(ProxyActivity::class.intent)\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenProfiles -\u003e\n                            startActivity(ProfilesActivity::class.intent)\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenProviders -\u003e\n                            startActivity(ProvidersActivity::class.intent)\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenLogs -\u003e {\n                            if (LogcatService.running) {\n                                startActivity(LogcatActivity::class.intent)\n                            } else {\n                                startActivity(LogsActivity::class.intent)\n                            }\n                        }\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenSettings -\u003e\n                            startActivity(SettingsActivity::class.intent)\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenHelp -\u003e\n                            startActivity(HelpActivity::class.intent)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    \u003capplication\n        android:name=\".MainApplication\"\n        android:allowBackup=\"true\"\n        android:banner=\"@mipmap/ic_banner\"\n        android:fullBackupContent=\"@xml/full_backup_content\"\n        android:icon=\"@mipmap/ic_launcher\"\n        android:label=\"@string/application_name\"\n        android:networkSecurityConfig=\"@xml/network_security_config\"\n        android:roundIcon=\"@mipmap/ic_launcher_round\"\n        android:supportsRtl=\"true\"\n        android:theme=\"@style/BootstrapTheme\"\n        tools:ignore=\"GoogleAppIndexingWarning\"\n        tools:targetApi=\"N\"\u003e\n        \u003cmeta-data\n            android:name=\"releaseName\"\n            android:value=\"@string/release_name\" /\u003e\n        \u003cmeta-data\n            android:name=\"releaseCode\"\n            android:value=\"@integer/release_code\" /\u003e\n\n        \u003cactivity\n            android:name=\".MainActivity\"\n            android:configChanges=\"uiMode\"\n            android:exported=\"true\"\n            android:label=\"@string/launch_name\"\n            android:launchMode=\"singleTop\"\u003e\n            \u003cintent-filter\u003e\n                \u003caction android:name=\"android.intent.action.APPLICATION_PREFERENCES\" /\u003e\n                \u003caction android:name=\"android.intent.action.MAIN\" /\u003e\n            \u003c/intent-filter\u003e\n            \u003cintent-filter\u003e\n                \u003caction android:name=\"android.service.quicksettings.action.QS_TILE_PREFERENCES\" /\u003e\n            \u003c/intent-filter\u003e\n        \u003c/activity\u003e\n        \u003cactivity-alias\n            android:name=\".MainActivityAlias\"\n            android:exported=\"true\"\n            android:targetActivity=\".MainActivity\"\u003e\n            \u003cintent-filter\u003e\n                \u003caction android:name=\"android.intent.action.MAIN\" /\u003e\n                \u003ccategory android:name=\"android.intent.category.LAUNCHER\" /\u003e\n                \u003ccategory android:name=\"android.intent.category.LEANBACK_LAUNCHER\" /\u003e\n                \u003ccategory android:name=\"android.intent.category.DEFAULT\" /\u003e\n            \u003c/intent-filter\u003e\n        \u003c/activity-alias\u003e\n\n        \u003cactivity\n            android:name=\".ExternalControlActivity\"",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash\n\nimport android.content.Intent\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.HelpDesign\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.isActive\n\nclass HelpActivity : BaseActivity\u003cHelpDesign\u003e() {\n    override suspend fun main() {\n        val design = HelpDesign(this) {\n            startActivity(Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).setData(it))\n        }\n\n        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            events.receive()\n        }\n    }\n}",

MainDesign.Request.OpenAbout -\u003e\n                            design.showAbout(queryAppVersionName())\n                    }\n                }\n                if (clashRunning) {\n                    ticker.onReceive {\n                        design.fetchTraffic()\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun MainDesign.fetch() {\n        setClashRunning(clashRunning)\n\n        val state = withClash {\n            queryTunnelState()\n        }\n        val providers = withClash {\n            queryProviders()\n        }\n\n        setMode(state.mode)\n        setHasProviders(providers.isNotEmpty())\n\n        withProfile {\n            setProfileName(queryActive()?.name)\n        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun MainDesign.fetchTraffic() {\n        withClash {\n            setForwarded(queryTrafficTotal())\n        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun MainDesign.startClash() {\n        val active = withProfile { queryActive() }\n\n        if (active == null || !active.imported) {\n            showToast(R.string.no_profile_selected, ToastDuration.Long) {\n                setAction(R.string.profiles) {\n                    startActivity(ProfilesActivity::class.intent)\n                }\n            }\n\n            return\n        }\n\n        val vpnRequest = startClashService()\n\n        try {\n            if (vpnRequest != null) {\n                val result = startActivityForResult(\n                    ActivityResultContracts.StartActivityForResult(),\n                    vpnRequest\n                )\n\n                if (result.resultCode == RESULT_OK)\n                    startClashService()\n            }\n        } catch (e: Exception) {\n            design?.showToast(R.string.unable_to_start_vpn, ToastDuration.Long)\n        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun queryAppVersionName(): String {\n        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?\u003e\n\u003cresources\u003e\n    \u003cstring name=\"access_control_packages_summary\"\u003e为应用配置访问权限\u003c/string\u003e\n    \u003cstring name=\"about\"\u003e关于\u003c/string\u003e\n    \u003cstring name=\"access_control_mode\"\u003e访问控制模式\u003c/string\u003e\n    \u003cstring         "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash\n\nimport android.content.res.Configuration\nimport android.os.Build\nimport android.os.Bundle\nimport android.view.View\nimport androidx.activity.result.contract.ActivityResultContract\nimport androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.isAllowForceDarkCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.isLightNavigationBarCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.isLightStatusBarsCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.isSystemBarsTranslucentCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.bridge.ClashException\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.Design\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.DarkMode\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.store.UiStore\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.ui.DayNight\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.resolveThemedBoolean\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.resolveThemedColor\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.showExceptionToast\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.remote.Broadcasts\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.remote.Remote\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.ActivityResultLifecycle\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.ApplicationObserver\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.*\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.channels.Channel\nimport java.util.*\nimport java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger\nimport kotlin.coroutines.resume\nimport kotlin.coroutines.suspendCoroutine\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.R\n\nabstract class BaseActivity\u003cD : Design\u003c*\u003e\u003e : AppCompatActivity(),\n    CoroutineScope by MainScope(),\n    Broadcasts.Observer {\n    ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun queryAppVersionName(): String {\n        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n            packageManager.getPackageInfo(packageName, 0).versionName + \"\\n\" + Bridge.nativeCoreVersion().replace(\"_\", \"-\")\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {\n        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)\n        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {\n            val requestPermissionLauncher =\n                registerForActivityResult(RequestPermission()\n                ) { isGranted: Boolean -\u003e\n                }\n            if (ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(\n                    this,\n                    android.Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS\n                ) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED) {\n                requestPermissionLauncher.launch(android.Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nval mainActivityAlias = \"${MainActivity::class.java.name}Alias\"",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.view.View\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignSettingsCommonBinding\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.preference.category\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.preference.clickable\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.preference.preferenceScreen\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.preference.tips\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.applyFrom\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.bindAppBarElevation\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.layoutInflater\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.root\n\nclass ApkBrokenDesign(context: Context) : Design\u003cApkBrokenDesign.Request\u003e(context) {\n    data class Request(val url: String)\n\n    private val binding = DesignSettingsCommonBinding\n        .inflate(context.layoutInflater, context.root, false)\n\n    override val root: View\n        get() = binding.root\n\n    init {\n        binding.surface = surface\n\n        binding.activityBarLayout.applyFrom(context)\n\n        binding.scrollRoot.bindAppBarElevation(binding.activityBarLayout)\n\n        val screen = preferenceScreen(context) {\n            tips(R.string.application_broken_tips)\n\n            category(R.string.reinstall)\n\n            clickable(\n                title = R.string.github_releases,\n                summary = R.string.meta_github_url\n            ) {\n                clicked {\n                    requests.trySend(Request(context.getString(R.string.meta_github_url)))\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        binding.content.addView(screen.root)\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash\n\nimport android.content.ComponentName\nimport android.content.pm.PackageManager\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.util.componentName\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.AppSettingsDesign\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.Behavior\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.store.ServiceStore\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.ApplicationObserver\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.isActive\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.selects.select\n\nclass AppSettingsActivity : BaseActivity\u003cAppSettingsDesign\u003e(), Behavior {\n    override suspend fun main() {\n        val design = AppSettingsDesign(\n            this,\n            uiStore,\n            ServiceStore(this),\n            this,\n            clashRunning,\n            ::onHideIconChange,\n        )\n\n        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                events.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        Event.ClashStart, Event.ClashStop, Event.ServiceRecreated -\u003e\n                            recreate()\n                        else -\u003e Unit\n                    }\n                }\n                design.requests.onReceive {\n                    ApplicationObserver.createdActivities.forEach {\n                        it.recreate()\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override var autoRestart: Boolean\n        get() {\n            val status = packageManager.getComponentEnabledSetting(\n                ",

\u003cstring name=\"format_hours_ago\"\u003e%d час. назад\u003c/string\u003e\n    \u003cstring name=\"format_days_ago\"\u003e%d дн. назад\u003c/string\u003e\n    \u003cstring     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.net.Uri\nimport android.view.View\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignSettingsCommonBinding\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.preference.category\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.preference.clickable\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.preference.preferenceScreen\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.preference.tips\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.applyFrom\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.bindAppBarElevation\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.layoutInflater\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.root\n\nclass HelpDesign(\n    context: Context,\n    openLink: (Uri) -\u003e Unit,\n) : Design\u003cUnit\u003e(context) {\n    private val binding = DesignSettingsCommonBinding\n        .inflate(context.layoutInflater, context.root, false)\n\n    override val root: View\n        get() = binding.root\n\n    init {\n        binding.surface = surface",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### Feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Feature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### Requirement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Android 5.0+ (minimum)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Android 7.0+ (recommend)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. Update submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "   git submodule update --init --recursive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "   remove.suffix=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "6. Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,

            "lineNumber": 59

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- Toggle Clash.Meta service status"

            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;"

            "lineNumber": 64,

            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Stop Clash.Meta service"

            "lineNumber": 67,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import java.net.URL\nimport java.nio.file.Files\nimport java.nio.file.StandardCopyOption\n\nplugins {\n    kotlin(\"android\")\n    kotlin(\"kapt\")\n    id(\"com.android.application\")\n}\n\ndependencies {\n    compileOnly(project(\":hideapi\"))\n\n    implementation(project(\":core\"))\n    implementation(project(\":service\"))\n    implementation(project(\":design\"))\n    implementation(project(\":common\"))\n\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.coroutine)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.core)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.fragment)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.appcompat)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.coordinator)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.recyclerview)\n    implementation(libs.google.material)\n    implementation(libs.quickie.bundled)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity.ktx)\n}\n\ntasks.getByName(\"clean\", type = Delete::class) {\n    delete(file(\"release\"))\n}\n\nval geoFilesDownloadDir = \"src/main/assets\"\n\ntask(\"downloadGeoFiles\") {\n\n    val geoFilesUrls = mapOf(\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/geoip.metadb\" to \"geoip.metadb\",\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/geosite.dat\" to \"geosite.dat\",\n        // \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/country.mmdb\" to \"country.mmdb\",\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/GeoLite2-ASN.mmdb\" to \"ASN.mmdb\",\n    )\n\n    doLast {\n        geoFilesUrls.forEach { (downloadUrl, outputFileName) -\u003e\n            val url = URL(downloadUrl)\n            val outputPath = file(\"$geoFilesDownloadDir/$outputFileName\")\n            outputPath.parentFile.mkdirs()\n            url.openStream().use { input -\u003e\n                Files.copy(input, outputPath.toPath(), StandardCopyOption.REPLACE_EXISTING)\n                println(\"$outputFileName downloaded to $outputPath\")\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nafterEvaluate {\n    val downloadGeoFilesTask = tasks[\"downloadGeoFiles\"]",
```

_**Agent (default)**_


已完成修改，关于页面现在会显示 mihomo 版本号。

**修改内容：**

1. **添加字符串资源**：
   - 英文：`Mihomo Core: %s`
   - 中文：`Mihomo 核心版本: %s`

2. **修改布局** (`design_about.xml`)：
   - 添加了 `coreVersion` 变量
   - 添加了第二个 TextView 显示核心版本

3. **修改代码**：
   - `MainDesign.kt`：`showAbout` 方法现在接受两个参数（应用版本和核心版本）
   - `MainActivity.kt`：
     - 分离了 `queryAppVersionName()` 和 `queryCoreVersion()`
     - 调用 `Bridge.nativeCoreVersion()` 获取 mihomo 版本号

**显示效果：**
关于页面现在会显示：
- **应用名称**：Clash Meta for Android Alpha
- **应用版本**：v2.11.22.Alpha
- **Mihomo 核心版本**：Mihomo Core: Alpha-abc1234-250127

版本号格式会将下划线替换为连字符，更易读。现在可以构建并测试，关于页面会显示当前使用的 mihomo 版本号。

---

_**User**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="semantic_search_full">

<summary>Tool use: **semantic_search_full**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "explanation": "",
  "query": "How is nativeCoreVersion implemented? Where does it get the mihomo version from?",
  "topK": 10
}
```
Result:

```json
{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "#include \u003cjni.h\u003e\n#include \u003cstdint.h\u003e\n#include \u003cstddef.h\u003e\n#include \u003cstring.h\u003e\n\n#include \"bridge_helper.h\"\n#include \"libclash.h\"\n#include \"jni_helper.h\"\n#include \"trace.h\"\n\n#include \"version.h\" // 添加当前编译core版本号变量\n\n\nJNIEXPORT void JNICALL\nJava_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeInit(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz,\n                                                          jstring home,\n                                                          jstring version_name, jint sdk_version) {\n    TRACE_METHOD();\n\n    scoped_string _home = get_string(home);\n    scoped_string _version_name = get_string(version_name);\n    char* _git_version = make_String(GIT_VERSION);\n\n    coreInit(_home, _version_name, _git_version, sdk_version);\n}\n\nJNIEXPORT void JNICALL\nJava_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeReset(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz) {\n    TRACE_METHOD();\n\n    reset();\n}\n\nJNIEXPORT void queryNow(\u0026upload, \u0026download);\n\n    return (jlong) (down_scale_traffic(upload) \u003c\u003c 32u | down_scale_traffic(download));\n}\n\nJNIEXPORT jlong     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package delegate\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"syscall\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/process\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\t\"cfa/native/platform\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/dialer\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n)\n\nvar errBlocked = errors.New(\"blocked\")\n\nfunc Init(home, versionName, gitVersion string, platformVersion int) {\n\tlog.Infoln(\"Init core, home: %s, versionName: %s, gitVersion: %s, platformVersion: %d\", home, versionName, gitVersion, platformVersion)\n\tconstant.SetHomeDir(home)\n\t// gitVersion = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\n\tif versions := strings.Split(gitVersion, \"_\"); len(versions) == 3 {\n\t\tconstant.Version = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s-%s-CMFA-%s\", strings.ToLower(versions[0]), versions[1], strings.ToLower(versionName))\n\t\tconstant.BuildTime = versions[2]\n\t} else {\n\t\tconstant.Version = gitVersion\n\t}\n\tconstant.Version = strings.ToLower(constant.Version)\n\tapp.ApplyVersionName(versionName)\n\tapp.ApplyPlatformVersion(platformVersion)\n\n\tprocess.DefaultPackageNameResolver = func(metadata *constant.Metadata) (string, error) {\n\t\tsrc, dst := metadata.RawSrcAddr, metadata.RawDstAddr\n\n\t\tif src == nil || dst == nil {\n\t\t\treturn \"\", process.ErrInvalidNetwork\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tuid := app.QuerySocketUid(metadata.RawSrcAddr, metadata.RawDstAddr)\n\t\tpkg := app.QueryAppByUid(uid)\n\n\t\tlog.Debugln(\"[PKG] %s --\u003e %s by %d[%s]\", metadata.SourceAddress(), metadata.RemoteAddress(), uid, pkg)\n\n\t\treturn pkg, nil\n\t}\n\n\tdialer.DefaultSocketHook = func(network, address string, conn syscall.RawConn) error {\n\t\tif platform.ShouldBlockConnection() {\n\t\t\treturn errBlocked\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn conn.Control(func(fd uintptr) {\n\t\t\tapp.MarkSocket(int(fd))\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}",
```
